description: Detect files changed in HEAD relative to HEAD~1.

provides.name: changed.files
provides.description: List of files changed in latest commit.

entry_script:
#!/usr/bin/env bash
set -euo pipefail
files=$(git diff --name-only HEAD~1 HEAD 2>/dev/null || true)
json=$(echo "$files" | jq -R -s -c 'split("\n")|map(select(length>0))')
sz bus emit changed.files "{\"files\": $json}" --module "${SZ_MODULE_ID:-changed-file-detector}" >/dev/null
notes: Self-contained shell; uses no source files.
